ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* Unique employee number */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Current salary of the employee */,
  "status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the employee */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the employee is based */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the department */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the department is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* Employee number associated with the salary */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary amount */,
  "from_date" TEXT /* Start date of the salary record */,
  "to_date" TEXT /* End date of the salary record */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the salary (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_emp_no FOREIGN KEY ("emp_no") REFERENCES employees ("emp_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* Employee number being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer (manager) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given in the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback from the reviewer */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for the employee's growth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_emp_no FOREIGN KEY ("emp_no") REFERENCES employees ("emp_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for system access (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR, Manager, Employee) */,
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* Employee number associated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit record */,
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* Employee number associated with the benefit */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., health, dental, retirement) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the benefit coverage */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the benefit coverage */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Name of the benefit provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_emp_no FOREIGN KEY ("emp_no") REFERENCES employees ("emp_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxes" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax record */,
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* Employee number associated with the tax record */,
  "tax_year" INTEGER /* Tax year for the record */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Total tax amount for the year */,
  "tax_withheld" TEXT /* Total tax withheld during the year */,
  "tax_filing_status" TEXT /* Tax filing status (e.g., single, married, head of household) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxes_emp_no FOREIGN KEY ("emp_no") REFERENCES employees ("emp_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work history record */,
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* Employee number associated with the record */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the previous company */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held at the previous company */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of employment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of employment */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason for leaving the previous company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_history_emp_no FOREIGN KEY ("emp_no") REFERENCES employees ("emp_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the office location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the office is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the office is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_projects" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment record */,
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* Employee number assigned to the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project ID assigned to the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee in the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_projects_emp_no FOREIGN KEY ("emp_no") REFERENCES employees ("emp_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* Employee number associated with the attendance */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of the attendance record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., present, absent, leave) */,
  "hours_worked" TEXT /* Number of hours worked on the attendance date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_attendance_emp_no FOREIGN KEY ("emp_no") REFERENCES employees ("emp_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* Employee number associated with the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_emp_no FOREIGN KEY ("emp_no") REFERENCES employees ("emp_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_requests" (
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave request */,
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* Employee number associated with the leave request */,
  "leave_type" TEXT /* Type of leave (e.g., vacation, sick, maternal) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the leave request (e.g., approved, rejected, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_emp_no FOREIGN KEY ("emp_no") REFERENCES employees ("emp_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* Employee number associated with the training program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training program */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Name of the training provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_emp_no FOREIGN KEY ("emp_no") REFERENCES employees ("emp_no")
)
